project_type: Static HTML/CSS/JS website (Cloudflare Pages via wrangler)
build_system: None - static files served directly. Cloudflare Pages deployment via wrangler.jsonc
test_framework: None - manual browser testing. Validation via HTML structure inspection
build_command: No build step needed - static HTML
test_command: No automated tests - validate HTML structure manually
verification_instructions: Open mpds.html in browser, verify all sections render, calculator produces correct results for all input combinations
setup_instructions: No setup needed - static HTML files
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no external package installs possible. All code must be inline or reference existing /assets/ files
contribution_requirements: Follow existing page patterns: use /assets/style.css design system, include dark mode script at top, use #site-header and #site-footer component loading via /assets/main.js, use .kw-blue .kw-gold .kw-green classes for keyword highlighting
key_patterns: 1. Pages use /assets/style.css for shared design system with CSS variables. 2. Page-specific styles go in inline <style> block. 3. Dark mode via html.dark class + localStorage script at top. 4. Header/footer loaded dynamically via #site-header/#site-footer divs + /assets/main.js. 5. Product pages use sections with .section, .container, .page-hero patterns. 6. Keyword highlighting: .kw-blue (Manulife blue), .kw-gold (accent gold), .kw-green (Manulife green). 7. FAQ uses .faq-list > .faq-item > .faq-trigger + .faq-body pattern. 8. Breadcrumb navigation at top. 9. WhatsApp CTA buttons throughout. 10. Calculator uses inline JavaScript with card-based result display.
relevant_files: /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/mdla.html (primary template - similar product page with calculator)
directory_structure: /pages/ - product HTML pages | /assets/ - CSS and JS | /components/ - header.html, footer.html | /Sample/ - reference/prototype pages | /Source/ - PDF source materials
